subject: refactor(audit): full audit sweep — 16 findings fixed across 9 triggers
body:
Audit findings addressed:

Critical:
- Fix missing setSearchOpen in useMemo deps by splitting it out entirely
- Split searchOpen into dedicated SearchModalProvider to prevent
  FilterContext over-subscription causing unnecessary re-renders

Architecture:
- Extract shared ModalBackdrop component (replaces 3 duplicate modal patterns)
- Extract shared useEscapeKey hook (replaces 3 duplicate Escape handlers)
- BurgerMenu, HeaderFilters, and search modal all use ModalBackdrop now

UX/Mobile:
- Add hitSlop to all header buttons for WCAG AA 44px touch targets
- Fix fuel type toggle (no deselect on re-tap, use All to deselect)
- Change search Modal to conditional rendering (not always mounted)

Code quality:
- Delete dead FuelTypeSelector.tsx and RadiusSelector.tsx
- Import shared constants in LocationSearch (remove local dupes)
- Add debug logging for filter changes, search modal, location selection
- Validate persisted fuel type ID against loaded fuel types
- Fix recent searches React key to include label for uniqueness

Documentation:
- Update CLAUDE.md architecture and project status
- Update USER_GUIDE.md (header dropdowns, search modal, 50/50 split)
- Update TESTING_GUIDE.md (new test scenarios and regression checklist)
- Update README.md status description
- Update SESSION_NOTES.md with current session context

Tags: audit, refactor, ui, ux, mobile, perf, docs
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: home-layout
Semver: minor

https://claude.ai/code/session_01WVyDTypj9oQmpr5yGNMmMP
